overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy traversing a shallow stream through an autumn forest. She passes ancient wooden ruins, crosses a wooden bridge, and exits onto a dirt path alongside rocky cliffs under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream beside rocky outcrop and wooden ruins

agents.ego_description: Aloy wading through knee-deep clear water, moving toward wooden settlement ruins ahead

entered.detail: massive moss-covered boulder at the water's edge with rough texture
dilapidated wooden settlement structures with red fabric awnings
tall trees with orange and yellow foliage surrounding the stream
clear greenish water with visible stones and pebbles beneath surface

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a shallow, clear stream alongside a massive rock formation, approaching ancient wooden ruins in the distance. The autumn forest surrounds the waterway with colorful foliage overhead.

events.description: leaving wooden ruins behind, entering open forest stream corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stream, navigating between autumn trees lining both banks

entered.detail: hazy mountain peak visible through the tree canopy in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider forest stream corridor, leaving the ruins behind. Aloy continues wading through the clear water between banks lined with vibrant autumn trees, with distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: wooden bridge comes into view ahead spanning the stream
character begins to exit the stream onto the rocky bank

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the wooden bridge while continuing through the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden footbridge with railings spanning the stream ahead

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches a wooden footbridge spanning the stream, passing beneath its structure. The water remains clear and shallow as she continues forward, with rocky banks visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside stream with rocky cliff

events.description: exits water onto dirt path alongside the stream

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the stream onto the rocky bank and continuing along the dirt path

entered.detail: steep reddish rock face with sparse vegetation rising beside the path
narrow earthen trail running alongside the water

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the stream onto a narrow dirt path running alongside the water, with a steep rocky cliff rising on the right. The wooden bridge falls behind as she continues along the bank through the autumn forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy traverses a shallow forest stream that eventually transitions into a narrow cliffside path. It begins with her wading through clear water beside a massive rock formation, moving toward ancient wooden ruins beneath a canopy of colorful autumn foliage. As she leaves the ruins behind, the scene opens into a wider stream corridor lined with vibrant trees and a view of distant mountains. The camera then follows her as she passes beneath a wooden footbridge and moves along rocky banks before finally exiting the water onto a dirt path. The journey concludes with the bridge falling behind as she travels alongside a steep rocky cliff under an overcast sky.
